title: intel-lpmd bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[0.0.9-1]
- Update to the upstream version 0.0.9

[0.0.6-1]
- Update to upstream release 0.0.6

[0.0.3-2]
- Rebuild for RHEL-9.5
- Resolves: RHEL-20167

[0.0.3-1]
- Update to 0.0.3
- Use cpuid() to detect Lcores

[0.0.2-1]
- Initial upstream release
full_text:
[0.0.9-1]
- Update to the upstream version 0.0.9

[0.0.6-1]
- Update to upstream release 0.0.6

[0.0.3-2]
- Rebuild for RHEL-9.5
- Resolves: RHEL-20167

[0.0.3-1]
- Update to 0.0.3
- Use cpuid() to detect Lcores

[0.0.2-1]
- Initial upstream release
